name: Lovers' Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. MARINATE CHICKEN IN WHITE WINE, GARLIC POWDER AND DRESSING FOR ONE HOUR.
2. PREHEAT OVEN TO 325 F.
3. SPREAD CHICKEN IN CASSEROLE, AND SQUEEZE FRESH LEMON JUICE ON TOP.
4. SPLASH MARINADE OVER EACH PIECE OF CHICKEN.
5. SPRINKLE WITH PEPPER AND PAPRIKA.
6. BAKE FOR 30 MINUTES.
